message.content:
Image 1: PASS - Shows user table with role badges (green/orange/amber) and RBAC legend panel.  
Image 2: FAIL - Shows "Alertes IA" instead of "Filières" view; incorrect content.  
Image 3: FAIL - Image 3 is actually "Alertes IA" (not "Journal d'audit"); missing audit table.  
Image 4: FAIL - Image 4 is duplicate of Image 1 (not "Paramètres"); missing 4 setting panels.
